text:
Prediction: No
Reasoning: The current visit record shows several serious comorbidities, including Urinary tract infection, Hyperosmolality and/or hypernatremia, Atrial fibrillation, Congestive heart failure, unspecified, Iron deficiency anemia, unspecified, Late effects of cerebrovascular disease, hemiplegia affecting unspecified side, Peripheral vascular disease, unspecified, Unspecified disorder of kidney and ureter, and Coronary atherosclerosis of native coronary artery. The patient is receiving various medications, including Docusate Sodium, Multivitamins, Paroxetine HCl, Milk of Magnesia, Sodium Chloride 0.9% Flush, Aspirin, Digoxin, Rosiglitazone Maleate, Ferrous Sulfate (Liquid), Lisinopril, Insulin, 1/2 NS, Cefpodoxime Proxetil, D5NS, Magnesium Sulfate, Potassium Chloride, NS, Iso-Osmotic Dextrose, Insulin Human Regular, Ceftazidime, Neutra-Phos, Vancomycin HCl, Ceftriaxone, Metoprolol, Heparin, Acetaminophen.

Crucially, while the patient is on Rosiglitazone Maleate (a thiazolidinedione, which can be associated with metabolic changes), and has cardiovascular risk
